rule.name: Email: Malicious Attachment Detected
rule.description: Email with CHM attachment targeting think-tank employee.

alert.title: Email: Malicious Attachment Detected
alert.summary: Spearphishing email with 'DPRK_Policy_Review.chm' attachment.

knowledge_base: Email: Malicious Attachment Detected - Analyze the associated files or emails for malicious characteristics.

rule.name: Network: Potential Port Scan Detected
rule.description: High volume of connections across multiple ports.

alert.title: Network: Potential Port Scan Detected
alert.summary: High volume of connections across multiple ports from internal IP.

knowledge_base: Authorized scan, verified with IT team.

rule.name: Execution: Compiled HTML Help spawned command shell
rule.description: hh.exe executed cmd.exe.

alert.title: Execution: Compiled HTML Help spawned command shell
alert.summary: hh.exe executed cmd.exe.

technique.name: System Binary Proxy Execution: Compiled HTML File

knowledge_base: Execution: Compiled HTML Help spawned command shell - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: File: VBScript Dropped by Command Shell
rule.description: cmd.exe created a VBS file in AppData.

alert.title: File: VBScript Dropped by Command Shell
alert.summary: cmd.exe created init.vbs.

technique.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Visual Basic

knowledge_base: File: VBScript Dropped by Command Shell - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Authentication: Failed Logon
rule.description: User experienced 3 failed logon attempts.

alert.title: Authentication: Failed Logon
alert.summary: User experienced 3 failed logon attempts.

knowledge_base: Expected user activity, verified with the user.

rule.name: Persistence: Suspicious Registry Run Key
rule.description: VBScript added to registry run key.

alert.title: Persistence: Suspicious Registry Run Key
alert.summary: VBScript added to registry run key.

knowledge_base: Persistence: Suspicious Registry Run Key - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Process: Remote PowerShell Execution
rule.description: PowerShell remoting used by Administrator account.

alert.title: Process: Remote PowerShell Execution
alert.summary: PowerShell remoting used by Administrator account.

knowledge_base: Legitimate IT administration activity, verified with IT team.

rule.name: C2: Suspicious Beaconing Activity
rule.description: Periodic connections to unknown external IP.

alert.title: C2: Suspicious Beaconing Activity
alert.summary: Periodic HTTPS connections to unknown external IP.

additional_context: wscript.exe beaconing to Kimsuky C2 infrastructure to download next stage.
knowledge_base: C2: Suspicious Beaconing Activity

rule.name: Defense Evasion: Attempt to Stop Security Service
rule.description: PowerShell used to modify Windows Defender settings.

alert.title: Defense Evasion: Attempt to Stop Security Service
alert.summary: PowerShell modifying Defender settings.

technique.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

knowledge_base: Defense Evasion: Attempt to Stop Security Service - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Discovery: System Information Discovery
rule.description: Systeminfo executed by suspicious process.

alert.title: Discovery: System Information Discovery
alert.summary: Systeminfo executed by suspicious process.

knowledge_base: Discovery: System Information Discovery - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Network: Large Outbound Data Transfer
rule.description: Large volume of data sent to external IP.

alert.title: Network: Large Outbound Data Transfer
alert.summary: Large volume of data sent to external IP.

knowledge_base: Authorized data transfer/sync process, verified with IT team.

rule.name: Discovery: Process Discovery
rule.description: Tasklist executed by suspicious process.

alert.title: Discovery: Process Discovery
alert.summary: Tasklist executed by suspicious process.

knowledge_base: Discovery: Process Discovery - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Credential Access: Browser Data Accessed
rule.description: Suspicious process accessing Chrome user data.

alert.title: Credential Access: Browser Data Accessed
alert.summary: PowerShell accessing Chrome Login Data.

knowledge_base: Credential Access: Browser Data Accessed - Verify the activity with the relevant IT or Security team to determine its legitimacy.

rule.name: Execution: Unsigned PowerShell Script
rule.description: Execution of an unsigned local script.

alert.title: Execution: Unsigned PowerShell Script
alert.summary: Execution of an unsigned local script.

knowledge_base: Legitimate IT administration activity, verified with IT team.

rule.name: Collection: Keylogging Activity Detected
rule.description: Unsigned DLL injected into explorer.exe hooking keyboard.

alert.title: Collection: Keylogging Activity Detected
alert.summary: Keylogger injected into explorer.exe.

additional_context: Kimsuky payload injected a keylogger into explorer.exe to capture keystrokes and sensitive data.
knowledge_base: Collection: Keylogging Activity Detected - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Collection: Data Staging via Archive
rule.description: Large CAB or ZIP file created in AppData.

alert.title: Collection: Data Staging via Archive
alert.summary: Archive file created using makecab.exe.

technique.name: Archive Collected Data: Archive via Utility

additional_context: Adversary using makecab.exe to archive collected sys.txt, Chrome data, and keylog data.
knowledge_base: Collection: Data Staging via Archive - Verify the activity with the relevant IT or Security team to determine its legitimacy.

rule.name: Authentication: Logon Outside Business Hours
rule.description: Successful logon occurred at 3 AM.

alert.title: Authentication: Logon Outside Business Hours
alert.summary: Successful logon occurred at 3 AM.

knowledge_base: Expected user activity, verified with the user.

rule.name: Exfiltration: Data Exfiltration via HTTP POST
rule.description: Large HTTP POST request to suspicious domain.

alert.title: Exfiltration: Data Exfiltration via HTTP POST
alert.summary: Large POST request to suspicious domain.

additional_context: Adversary exfiltrating temp.cab to Kimsuky infrastructure via HTTP POST.
knowledge_base: Exfiltration: Data Exfiltration via HTTP POST
